title: Antigence Subnet: Decentralized Verification for AI Outputs on Bittensor
description: A decentralized verification subnet for Bittensor where miners run anomaly detectors (antibodies), validators apply selection pressure through hidden evaluation datasets, and the network produces a shared trust score for AI outputs. Transforms Antigence's immune-inspired self/non-self detection paradigm into an economic incentive system. Verification-as-a-service: any Bittensor subnet can consume the trust signal.
notes: Part of the Antigence platform for immune-inspired AI verification. This subnet extends the standalone Antigence system (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18109862) into a decentralized incentive network on Bittensor.
